---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem with the Skill, scripts, or templates
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## What happened?

Describe the observed behavior and what you expected instead.

## Minimal reproduction

Provide safe steps and sanitized sample data. Do not attach restricted PDFs, personal data, credentials, or secrets.

## Component

- [ ] Skill instructions
- [ ] PDF indexing
- [ ] Matrix initialization
- [ ] Matrix validation
- [ ] Templates
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Environment

- Release tag or commit:
- Operating system:
- Python version:
- Codex surface:
- Relevant dependency versions:

## Additional context

Add sanitized logs or screenshots if they help reproduce the problem.

## Safety checks

- [ ] I removed restricted PDFs, personal data, credentials, and secrets.
- [ ] I searched existing Issues and Discussions.
